app.name: FitSorted
app.description: AI-powered calorie and macro tracker that runs entirely inside WhatsApp. No app download needed. Built for South Africans with local food data.
app.audience: South Africans who want to track calories but find existing apps too expensive, too data-heavy, or too American
app.problem: Calorie tracking apps cost R350+/month, eat 150MB+ storage, burn through data, and don't know SA food
app.differentiator: Works inside WhatsApp (already on 90% of SA phones), SA food database (Nando's, Kauai, Steers, Woolworths), negligible data usage
